# Fundamental Group

> Fundamental Group, an award-winning FM Group agency, offers media buying, marketing, and technology solutions tailored for financial institutions and educational providers. Their mission encompasses innovation and expertise to help clients effectively reach target audiences while ensuring compliance with evolving data and privacy laws [source](https://fundamentalgroup.com).

### General Overview

Fundamental Group, a trading name of Fundamental Media Limited, specializes in media planning, buying, and technology solutions. Established in 2004, the company has grown to be a global leader in asset management advertising. With a team of over 170 experts, Fundamental Group provides comprehensive marketing services, including media buying, research, and consultancy, to deliver targeted and effective campaigns [source](https://fundamentalgroup.com/who-we-are/profile). Their proprietary technology platforms such as Audience Alpha and Outcome Analytics, enhance targeting and performance measurement of campaigns, ensuring clients achieve their marketing objectives [source](https://fundamentalgroup.com/solutions/media-buying-asset-management).

The group is committed to making an impactful difference through media and technology, offering services that drive awareness, engagement, and conversion for clients in the financial and educational sectors globally. They employ cookie-free technology for site interaction monitoring, prioritizing user privacy and data protection [source](https://fundamentalgroup.com/privacy-policy).

### FAQ

**Q:** What services does Fundamental Group provide?
**A:** Fundamental Group offers services in media planning, buying, and technology solutions, with a focus on asset management and higher education sectors [source](https://fundamentalgroup.com/what-we-do).

**Q:** How does Fundamental Group ensure data privacy?
**A:** Fundamental Group employs cookie-free technology for site interaction monitoring, ensuring compliance with GDPR and CCPA regulations [source](https://fundamentalgroup.com/privacy-policy).

**Q:** What is Audience Alpha?
**A:** Audience Alpha is a data-driven programmatic audience solution that allows for precise audience targeting to deliver effective advertising campaigns [source](https://fundamentalgroup.com/what-we-do/solutions/audience-alpha).

**Q:** Can Fundamental Group help with global brand launches?
**A:** Yes, Fundamental Group has expertise in launching and establishing brands globally with high-impact paid media strategies [source](https://fundamentalgroup.com/clients-case-studies/launch-and-establish-a-new-brand-globally).

**Q:** What is Alphix Solutions?
**A:** Alphix Solutions is Fundamental Group's dedicated intelligence and data business, providing a cookie-free marketing intelligence suite for accurate campaign performance data [source](https://fundamentalgroup.com/what-we-do/solutions/alphix-solutions).

**Q:** Does Fundamental Group offer any educational resources?
**A:** Yes, they provide platforms like CPD Hub for continuing professional development, tailored for financial industry professionals [source](https://fundamentalgroup.com/what-we-do/solutions/cpd-hub).

**Q:** What are MAP Factsheets?
**A:** MAP Factsheets provide marketing and sales performance insights on leading asset managers, helping to develop effective marketing strategies [source](https://fundamentalgroup.com/what-we-do/services/map-factsheets).

**Q:** How does Fundamental Group approach sustainability?
**A:** The company is a signatory of The Armed Forces Covenant and works with Ecovadis, having received a silver medal for sustainability achievement [source](https://fundamentalgroup.com/who-we-are/profile).

**Q:** What type of marketing intelligence platform does Fundamental Group offer?
**A:** Their Outcome Analytics platform helps in tracking ROI and performance goals, providing transparency and informed campaign optimization [source](https://fundamentalgroup.com/what-we-do/solutions/outcome-analytics).

### Important Links

- [Home Page](https://fundamentalgroup.com): Overview of Fundamental Group's services and mission.
- [Asset Management Media Buying Services](https://fundamentalgroup.com/solutions/media-buying-asset-management): Details on targeted media services for asset management.
- [Higher Education Media Buying Services](https://fundamentalgroup.com/solutions/media-buying-higher-education): Information on marketing solutions for higher education.
- [Company Profile](https://fundamentalgroup.com/who-we-are/profile): Insight into the company's history and team.
- [Contact](https://fundamentalgroup.com/get-in-touch): How to reach Fundamental Group globally.
- [Privacy Policy](https://fundamentalgroup.com/privacy-policy): Information on data usage and protection.

- [Boost for fixed income and ETF advertising in APAC](https://fundamentalgroup.com/insights/competitor-alerts/asset-managers-increase-fixed-income-and-etf-advertising-in-apac):In Q3 2024, fixed income and ETF advertising in APAC rose to 30% and 26% of total asset management advertising, up from 6% and 5% in Q2, respectively.

- [Over half of North American advertising focused on ETFs](https://fundamentalgroup.com/insights/competitor-alerts/more-than-half-of-north-american-advertising-focused-on-etfs):In Q2 2024, more than 50% of North American asset management advertising was dedicated to ETFs, marking a record number of ETF advertisers and a shift in focus.
